title: crambe filiformis
intro: Crambe filiformis, also known as sea rocket or crambe, is a type of annual or biennial flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of crambe filiformis are said to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat skin conditions and wounds.
